title: The Burden of Proof
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A defense attorney takes on an impossible case — his client confessed, the evidence is overwhelming, and he believes she is innocent.
long_description: Leo Alder has never lost a case he believed in. But the State v. Mara Velez is different: his client confessed on video, her fingerprints are on the weapon, and every piece of physical evidence places her at the scene of a murder she swears she did not commit. As Alder digs deeper, he discovers a conspiracy that reaches into the prosecutor's office, the police evidence room, and a cold case from twelve years ago that someone has gone to great lengths to bury. The Burden of Proof is a tightly-plotted legal thriller about the difference between evidence and truth, and the price of believing your client when no one else does.
